alternate_meetings.highlight: Business/MarComs working group alternates Wednesdays; next May 6 at 15:00 UTC

design_discussions.highlight: Lucid uses top-of-block fee auction; burned fees discourage exogenous MEV extraction
Non-revealed transactions can revert without wasting block space (builder reuses gas)
Same-slot decryption proposal enables execution optimization and builder keeper payments
Proposal: Allow sealed transactions with keys to act as plaintext (optional same-slot inclusion)
Wide sandwiches (price manipulation) unavoidable but Encrypted Mempool increases risk

cryptographic_research.highlight: Gottfried exploring commitment-only designs (no mandatory encryption for transport)
Planning Eurocrypt workshops to engage crypto researchers on threshold decryption needs

strategic_priorities.highlight: Priority: Launch testnet to make Encrypted Mempool tangible for ecosystem
Need core dev outreach session (async or sync) addressing Lucid concerns
Create landing page visualizing same-slot decryption concept for evangelism

action_items.action: Write detailed spec for commitment-based design with optional encryption
Create landing page with visuals explaining same-slot decryption improvements
Recruit client team representatives for ongoing EM working group participation

targets.target: May 6, 2026 - Business/MarComs EM working group meeting at 15:00 UTC
